text: As I stand here, witnessing a gathering where someone announces their impending retirement, I feel the weight of endings and beginnings. The room is heavy with a sense of transition—melancholy laced with appreciation. Stepping into the next space, the vibrant wall of research and development invites reflection. The poetic words about confusion and meaning echo my mood: there is sadness in farewells, yet also a playful acceptance that new meanings, perhaps even hope, assemble after partings. I feel both contemplative and strangely comforted by the uncertainty that surrounds change.
